text: Nvidia unveiled its next-generation data-center GPU at a developer conference, claiming a 2x jump in inference throughput over the prior architecture while drawing less power per token.
The governor signed a bill expanding offshore wind leases along the coast, setting a target of four gigawatts of new capacity by 2032 and creating a state office to fast-track permits.
Lawmakers in the upper chamber blocked a procedural motion on the spending package, leaving federal agencies facing a partial shutdown unless a stopgap measure passes by Friday.

Researchers reported that a once-weekly injectable lowered average blood glucose more than the standard daily therapy in a late-stage trial, though gastrointestinal side effects led some participants to drop out.
The retailer cut its full-year profit forecast after a soft quarter, blaming weaker discretionary spending and higher freight costs, and said it would slow new store openings.
The defending champions advanced to the semifinals after a late goal in extra time, extending their unbeaten run in the tournament to eleven matches across two seasons.
